chunks.title: Yahweh's Challenge to Job
chunks.reason: Introduction of Yahweh's speech and the initial call for Job to answer.

chunks.title: Creation of the Sea and Earth
chunks.reason: Description of Yahweh's control over the sea and the dawn.

chunks.title: The Deep and Light
chunks.reason: Questions regarding the depths of the sea, death, and the dwelling place of light.

chunks.title: Storehouses of Snow and Rain
chunks.reason: Discussion on weather phenomena like snow, hail, rain, and ice.

chunks.title: The Heavens and Clouds
chunks.reason: Questions about constellations, the Bear, and the mechanics of clouds.

chunks.title: Wild Animals and Provision
chunks.reason: Examples of Yahweh's care for lions and ravens in the wild.
